creator: jsa.bsd@gmail.com
text:
I am unable to duplicate a build failure on amd64 running r206119. I just got 
through building all of qt, including qt-moc-4.6.1, as well as vlc without fault.

I am currently watching videos without issue.

Can you provide any more details on duplicating this failure? Perhaps an OPTION 
that I am not using is broken?
